productDisplayName: Puma Men Heritage Polo Ribbon Red Tshirt
description: Style Note German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity, and this T-shirt is the kind you can't have enough of. This stylish piece is an off-duty must have, pair it with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes.Product Details Red polo T-shirt, has short sleeves with striped ribbed cuffs, striped ribbed collar, buttoned placket, branding on left chest and below nape of the neck and a vented hem Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold, separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry Size and Fit Comfort fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
